company: SEAGULL COOLING TECHNOLOGIES (ASIA PACIFIC) SDN. BHD.
description: JOB SUMMARY We are seeking a high-performing, hands-on AI Application Engineer to lead the design, development, and deployment of scalable AI-powered workflows. This role is focused on transforming complex, unstructured engineering and business data into structured, high-value outputs through the effective application of LLMs and intelligent automation. The ideal candidate combines strong analytical thinking with a practical, execution-driven mindset, and thrives in fast-paced, evolving environments. You will work closely with cross-functional stakeholders to architect and deliver robust internal AI solutions, enhance data workflows, and support both cloud and on-premise AI deployments. This role requires the ability to operate independently, translate ambiguous requirements into production-ready solutions, and communicate effectively with both technical and non-technical audiences, driving tangible business impact through applied AI. RESPONSIBLITIES:- Your responsibilities include the following but are not limited to: · Design and develop AI workflows for data extraction, processing, and output generation · Convert business and engineering requirements into AI-driven solutions · Build and optimize prompt workflows, validation logic, and structured outputs · Develop rapid prototypes and scale them into stable internal tools · Evaluate and implement cloud-based and local LLM solutions · Support deployment of on-premise/private AI environments where required · Process and structure data from PDFs, Excel, Word, emails, and scanned documents · Improve OCR, document parsing, and metadata handling processes · Standardise raw project and client data into structured formats · Integrate AI workflows with internal systems, databases, and APIs · Collaborate with ERP/system teams on automation and data integration · Develop internal tools, dashboards, and user-friendly interfaces · Create test cases and validate AI outputs against real-world scenarios · Identify and fix issues such as inaccuracies, missing data, or inconsistencies · Continuously improve system accuracy, reliability, and usability · Document workflows, assumptions, and technical limitations · Support internal training, pilot rollouts, and user feedback collection · Carry out additional tasks as directed by superior or management. Experience Requirements Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Data Science, or related field 2–5 years of experience in AI application development or workflow automation Hands-on experience with LLMs, AI APIs, or AI orchestration frameworks Strong proficiency in Python and data processing libraries Experience handling structured and unstructured data (e.g., documents, spreadsheets) Familiarity with APIs, JSON, and system integration concepts Knowledge of OCR, document parsing, and data transformation techniques Exposure to local/open-source LLM deployment is an added advantage Understanding of AI system security, privacy, and infrastructure constraints Experience in ERP systems or internal tool development will be advantageous Exposure to engineering, technical documentation, or industrial environments will be considered an added advantage Familiarity with RAG pipelines, vector databases, or knowledge-base systems will be advantageous Fluent in English, Malay, and Mandarin to serve Mandarin-speaking customers (spoken and written). Job Type: Full-time Pay: RM7,000 – RM12,000.00 per month Schedule: Monday to Friday Work Location : In person Company Benefits: Annual Leave, Medical Leave, Birthday Leave, Hospitalization Leave, Maternity Leave, Paternity Leave etc. Medical Insurance: Group Hospitalization & Surgical Insurance, Group Term Life Insurance Statutory Contribution: EPF, SOCSO and SOCSO EIS Bonus, Annual Increment, Promotion (Non-contractual and at sole discretion of Company) Medical Check-up Medical Claim, Dental Claim, Optical Claim, Mileage Claim Subsistence Allowance & Travelling Allowance Internal and External Training Staff Welfares: Monthly Staff Birthday Celebration, Sports Activities, Festival Celebration, Team Building, Company Annual Event Company Polo-T, Company Uniform, Company Jacket Appropriate Pantry Essentials: Microwave, Refrigerator, Coffee Machine, Water Purifier, Snacks Entertainment Area: Pool table, Switch, Table Football. We offer a competitive and attractive staff benefits to the successful candidate with attractive remuneration and benefits, statutory contributions, medical and personal accident insurance coverages, medical claims inclusive of dental andmedical check-up, company uniforms, staff welfare programmes, learning and development as well as staff career path and development.
